ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser, IF(( ((ISNEW()) || (!ISNEW() && ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Date__c))) && (!ISNULL(Insolvency_Date__c )) && (TODAY() - Insolvency_Date__c > 60) && (Allow_Insolvency_Date_In_Past__c = false) ), true, false))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Insolvency Date is older than 2 months. Please accept the checkbox first.
